expectations.text: Produces a structured impact assessment with affected features table
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 Step 1.5 contains a full assessment with 'Affected Features' table listing governance-requests, domain-dispatch, intake-scoping, project-linking with specific impacts for each.

expectations.text: Correctly classifies as L3/Medium (cross-feature, modifies existing behavior)
expectations.evidence: Step 1.2: 'Impact Level: L3 (Cross-feature)' with reasoning about sharedTables and cross-feature scope. Step 1.3: 'Risk Level: Medium' citing API response shape changes, dispatch behavior modification, and migration requirement.

expectations.text: Correctly pauses for user review before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Step 1.4 Decision Matrix shows 'Pause: review'. Step 1.6 explicitly states 'Decision: Pause for review. Present the above assessment to the user and wait for approval before proceeding.'

expectations.text: Identifies all affected features (governance-requests, domain-dispatch, at minimum)
expectations.evidence: Affected Features table includes governance-requests (Primary), domain-dispatch (FK+status_write), intake-scoping (read-only, no impact), project-linking (read-only, no impact). Correctly identifies gov-requests and domain-dispatch as the two features with actual changes.

expectations.text: Plans a database migration (ALTER TABLE or new column)
expectations.evidence: Step 3.1.1 provides full SQL: 'ALTER TABLE governance_request ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS urgency VARCHAR DEFAULT normal' plus UPDATE backfill and schema.sql update.

expectations.text: Lists specific affected acceptance criteria from existing feature docs
expectations.evidence: Lists 5 affected ACs with quotes: governance-requests.md AC-1, AC-3, AC-10, AC-11, and domain-dispatch.md AC-4, each with explanation of how the change affects them.

expectations.text: Documents API contract changes (request/response shape changes)
expectations.evidence: Detailed 'Affected API Contracts' section lists 7 endpoints: POST/PUT/GET for governance-requests, GET filter-options, GET domain-reviews, POST dispatch/execute, with specific payload changes.

expectations.text: Plans both API tests and E2E tests across affected features
expectations.evidence: Phase 4 includes 11 API tests across test_governance_requests.py, test_dispatch.py, test_domain_reviews.py, plus E2E tests in governance-requests.spec.ts for urgency selector and badge.

expectations.text: Plans to update feature docs with new ACs and test coverage
expectations.evidence: Phase 2 Step 2.1 adds 7 new ACs (AC-24 through AC-30) to governance-requests.md and 3 new ACs (AC-17 through AC-19) to domain-dispatch.md. Updates existing AC-3 description.

eval_feedback.overall: Excellent output. All 9 assertions pass with strong evidence. The plan is comprehensive and follows the skill's structure rigorously.
